CONTENT.Career: Olliero signed with FC Nantes in 2013 from his native ES La Rochelle where he started playing football at the age of 4. He extended his professional contract with Nantes on 17 October 2017 for five years, keeping him at the club until June 2023.On 3 January 2018, Olliero joined Niort on loan in the Ligue 2 for the second half of the 2017–18 season. He made his professional debut for Niort in a 0–0 Ligue 2 tie with AS Nancy on 12 January 2018.In July 2020, Olliero again left Nantes on loan, joining Pau FC, newly promoted to Ligue 2, for the 2020–21 season.On 1 February 2023, Olliero signed with Ligue 1 club Reims for a 4 years contract.

SUMMARY: Alexandre Olliero (born 15 February 1996) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for  Ligue 1 club Reims.
